payload.answer: I don’t currently have any recorded open ideas from you about knowledge graphs. If you share a few of the topics you’re curious about (e.g., how to design schemas, build/ingest data, query languages, graph embeddings, or tooling), I can help synthesize them.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory about the user's open ideas regarding knowledge graphs was provided in the input.

details: No memory cards added because no durable facts were provided.

repair_options: Ask the user for their current interests/questions about knowledge graphs (2–5 bullet points).
Offer a short menu of common open areas (schema design, RDF/OWL, entity linking, KG construction, SPARQL/Gremlin, embeddings, evaluation) and ask which ones they’re considering.
If the system can access prior chat history, request it to extract prior “open ideas” about knowledge graphs.
